Here's the concise description:

**Gemma 4 E4B-IT** is Google's 4.5B effective parameter (8B total) multimodal model built for edge/on-device deployment, using a novel Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) architecture that keeps compute costs at 4.5B while expanding total parameters — letting it punch well above its weight class, outperforming Gemma 3 27B on most benchmarks.
